title: Pandora Track
description: A music track in the Pandora catalog, returned by playback and search APIs.

trackToken.description: Unique token identifying this track instance for playback

albumArtUrl.description: URL for the album artwork image

audioUrl.description: Streaming audio URL for the track (subscription and device UUID dependent)

songRating.description: User rating for the track (1 = thumbs up, -1 = thumbs down, 0 = unrated)
